Thermal risks are minimal as the reaction is not photochemical and the Da_thermal is not applicable. The key hazard species are not explicitly listed, but the use of TBAB/EG solvent at high temperatures requires careful handling. BPR settings are inadequate for all candidates due to the high pressure drops, necessitating revision. Material compatibility is satisfactory with PFA, which is suitable for the high temperature and pressure conditions.
